meta.title: About Us
meta.description: An independent, fee-only, fiduciary financial advisory firm. Founded in 2003 to give clients clarity, confidence, and a plan built around their life.

hero.heading: A different kind of advisory.
hero.lede: Independent, fee-only, fiduciary — and committed to the families and institutions we serve for the long term.

story.heading: Twenty years of disciplined work.
story.paragraph1: Hargrove Wealth Advisory was founded in 2003 by two partners who had spent the previous decade inside the largest names in finance and concluded the same thing: the brokerage model wasn't designed around the client. They built something different — independent, fee-only, and bound by the fiduciary standard. Twelve families took a chance on them in the first year.
story.paragraph2: Twenty-plus years later, we serve more than 500 households and institutional clients across the country. We've intentionally stayed boutique. We turn down more business than we take. Our advisors carry small books because we believe the quality of advice depends on the time we spend with each client — and the time we spend with the math.
story.missionText: to empower clients with clarity, confidence, and a plan built around their life.

items.title: Fiduciary Duty
items.body: We are legally obligated to act in your interest. Always. No exceptions.

items.title: Transparency
items.body: Our fees are clear, our methods are documented, and our reasoning is shared.

items.title: Independence
items.body: We are owner-operated and unaffiliated with any product manufacturer.

items.title: Long-Term Thinking
items.body: We measure success in decades, not quarters. Patience compounds.

items.text: Founded by Robert Hargrove and a second partner with 12 founding clients.
Navigated the financial crisis with disciplined rebalancing; no client took permanent losses on plan.
Expanded service model to institutional and endowment clients.
Launched digital planning tools for clients to view their full picture in one place.
$2B in assets under management; 500+ households served.

teamPreview.heading: A small, experienced team.
teamPreview.lede: You'll know your advisor by name and they'll know your story. That's the model.

members.name: Robert Hargrove, CFP®, CFA
members.title: Founding Partner
members.bio: 25 years of experience. Specializes in estate and retirement planning. Wharton MBA. Coaches youth soccer on weekends.

members.name: Sarah Whitfield, CFP®
members.title: Partner, Wealth Management
members.bio: 18 years of experience. Focus on women in transition — divorce, widowhood, and inheritance. CFA Institute member.

members.name: David Kim, CPA, CFP®
members.title: Director of Tax Strategy
members.bio: 12 years of experience. Former Big 4 tax consultant. Specializes in business owners and real estate investors.

cta.heading: Ready to take control of your financial future?
cta.description: A conversation costs nothing. Clarity is the first step toward confidence.
